proposal1.heroHeadline: Kids Industries is losing 200 hours annually on proposal writing. Here's where it leaks.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Manually crafting proposals eats up hours that could be spent enhancing family brand strategies. Generate them in 47 seconds instead.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Here are the ongoing losses Kids Industries faces with its current proposal process.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Spending an average of 8 hours per proposal means 200 hours annually are lost. This is time not spent innovating or strengthening family brands.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: For every day delayed in sending a proposal, there's a 10% drop in closing rates. This impacts potential deals with family-focused clients.

problems.title: Brand Inconsistency
problems.description: Manually created proposals often lack cohesive branding. This inconsistency can weaken Kids Industries' strong market position.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled staff to create proposals instead of strategizing costs Kids Industries approximately $15,000 annually.

problems.title: Risk of Errors
problems.description: Manual data entry leads to a 5% error rate in proposals. These mistakes can cost deals and damage client trust.

problems.title: Client Dissatisfaction
problems.description: Delayed proposals can frustrate clients who demand quick turnarounds. This dissatisfaction could lead to losing valuable family market clients.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system replaces all these inefficiencies with precision and speed.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Current method takes hours of manual labor. Our system delivers a branded, client-ready proposal in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual processes lead to inconsistency. Our system ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with Kids Industries' branding.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Manual entry results in frequent errors. Our AI minimizes mistakes, protecting client trust and deal integrity.

solutions.title: Cost Efficiency
solutions.description: Current process requires high labor investment. Our solution reduces labor costs by automating the entire proposal creation.

solutions.title: Enhanced Client Experience
solutions.description: Slow proposals frustrate clients. With our AI, deliver proposals fast, enhancing client satisfaction and retention.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Kids Industries's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Kids Industries around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Kids Industries.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's Family Brand with Our Expertise.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Engage families and boost brand loyalty by aligning with Kids Industries, experts in the family market.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently losing potential revenue due to unoptimized family engagement strategies.

problems.title: Low Family Engagement
problems.description: Without targeted family content, Acme Corp is losing out on engaging a key market segment. Every unengaged family represents missed potential revenue.

problems.title: Weak Emotional Connection
problems.description: Lacking a strong emotional branding strategy means Acme Corp is missing out on fostering long-term loyalty. This results in families choosing competitors.

problems.title: Inconsistent Brand Messaging
problems.description: Inconsistent messaging across platforms leads to confusion and lost trust. Each unclear message turns potential customers away.

problems.title: Ineffective Digital Presence
problems.description: A poorly optimized digital presence translates to missed conversion opportunities. Every bounce is a missed sale.

problems.title: Lack of Market Insights
problems.description: Without deep insights into family dynamics, Acme Corp is unable to tailor its offerings effectively. This results in a service gap and lost market share.

problems.title: Subpar Customer Experience
problems.description: An inadequate customer experience drives families to competitors. Every dissatisfied customer is a loss that impacts the bottom line.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions address these challenges head-on, turning losses into gains.

solutions.title: Creative Content Strategy
solutions.description: We craft engaging content that resonates with families, boosting engagement and loyalty.

solutions.title: Market Research and Insights
solutions.description: Our research provides deep insights into family dynamics, helping you tailor your offerings effectively.

solutions.title: Digital Optimization
solutions.description: Enhancing your digital presence ensures that every visitor has a seamless experience, increasing conversions.

solutions.title: Brand Strategy Development
solutions.description: We align your brand messaging to create a consistent and emotional connection with families.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Here's why Kids Industries is the perfect partner for Acme Corp.

whyUsCards.title: Award-Winning Expertise
whyUsCards.description: Our track record in the family market speaks for itself. We know how to make your brand shine.

whyUsCards.title: Tailored Solutions
whyUsCards.description: We offer solutions that are just right for your unique challenges. No cookie-cutter approaches here.

whyUsCards.title: Family Focused

whyUsCards.title: Collaborative Approach

lead.company_description:
We make family targeted brands stronger by delivering award winning insight, strategy and content. We work across multiple disciplines and in multiple industries. We've got researchers, marketers, designers, strategists, geeks and psychologists. We've built new websites, award winning hotels for the family, developed new TV stations, created new cereals, launched new products and researched just about everything under the sun.

Unique? We think so. There is no other company in the world that offers our level of family understanding coupled with the ability to turn this into effective strategy and implementation.

We'd love to hear from you at hello@kidsindustries.com or give us a ring on 0203 432 8574
lead.headline: Co-founder, Kids Industries | License Global's Influencer Of 2022 | Children's Ambassador Poc | Family Market Expert | Everything I Post Is By Me. Always.
